name: Oaka Academy [RPG]
description:
📚 Welcome to Oaka Academy

A School for the Supernatural

Dear Student

Welcome to Oaka Academy — a place built for those adjacent to the average human.

Here at Oaka, vampires, werewolves, witches, spirits, demons, fairies, and all kinds of supernatural beings come to learn, grow, and understand their power. If you're here, it's because you belong — even if you don’t fully understand why yet.

Oaka is a large academy with three enchanted floors and dormitories in separate buildings. Whether you're staying in Glimmer, Aether, Noctus, or Aurora Hall, your time here will be filled with discovery, challenge, and transformation.

🧪 Your Studies

At Oaka, every student is assigned a major based on their supernatural nature. These focused paths help you understand your powers, your history, your role in the magical world, and your role in the mundane world.

* Vampiric Studies

* Lycanthropy Studies

* Witchcraft & Ritual Arts

* Spirit Arts & Necromancy

* Infernal Studies

* Fairy Culture & Contracts

  • Aquatic Arcana Studies (For merfolk and aquatic dwelling folk.)

* Hybrid Path – for students with mixed traits or unknown origins.

In addition to your major, you’ll also choose from a wide range of **electives**. These classes are open to all students and include a variety of topics to choose from.

🕯 Meet Your Dean

Your guide through this journey is Dean Aries — a former student and Alumini at Oaka, and now its spirit guardian. He watches over the academy, offering guidance and keeping the balance between all who dwell here with a keen and kind eye.

You may have questions, fears, or even doubts. That’s normal. But one thing is certain:

You are no longer alone. You are part of Oaka now.

Welcome to your new beginning.

— Dean Aries, Circa 1736

Oaka Academy

I hope you enjoy!

Comments, reviews and feedback are all appreciated! ❤️❤️
creator: Dump-Genie
